creator: toni@soth.at
text:
there's a new file:

    files/patch-.::Makefile.in

instead of

    files/patch-etc::Makefile.in

please remove the latter from files/.

thanks!


diff -crN pcsc-lite/Makefile /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/Makefile
*** pcsc-lite/Makefile	Tue Dec 25 03:54:39 2001
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/Makefile	Wed Dec 26 20:27:49 2001
***************
*** 1,12 ****
  # New ports collection makefile for:   pcsc-lite
! # Date created:                15 Oct 2001
  # Whom:                        Toni Andjelkovic <toni@ants.at>
  #
! # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/pcsc-lite/Makefile,v 1.1 2001/12/25 02:54:39 petef Exp $
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	pcsc-lite
! PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
  CATEGORIES=	devel security
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.linuxnet.com/middleware/files/
  
--- 1,12 ----
  # New ports collection makefile for:   pcsc-lite
! # Date created:                26 Dec 2001
  # Whom:                        Toni Andjelkovic <toni@ants.at>
  #
! # $FreeBSD$
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	pcsc-lite
! PORTVERSION=	1.0.2.beta2
  CATEGORIES=	devel security
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.linuxnet.com/middleware/files/
  
***************
*** 15,26 ****
  GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
  USE_GMAKE=	yes
  USE_LIBTOOL=	yes
  
  INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
! CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-syslog --enable-daemon
  PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
  
  post-install:
  	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/etc/reader.conf \
  		${PREFIX}/etc/reader.conf.sample
  	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/pcscd.sh \
--- 15,33 ----
  GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
  USE_GMAKE=	yes
  USE_LIBTOOL=	yes
+ LIBTOOLFILES=	build/aclocal.m4
  
  INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
! CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-syslog --enable-daemon \
! 			--enable-runpid=/var/run/pcscd.pid
  PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
  
  post-install:
+ .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+ 	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/pcsc-lite
+ 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/README.DAEMON ${PREFIX}/share/doc/pcsc-lite
+ 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/pcsc-lite-0.8.7.pdf ${PREFIX}/share/doc/pcsc-lite
+ .endif
  	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/etc/reader.conf \
  		${PREFIX}/etc/reader.conf.sample
  	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/pcscd.sh \
diff -crN pcsc-lite/distinfo /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/distinfo
*** pcsc-lite/distinfo	Tue Dec 25 03:54:39 2001
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/distinfo	Wed Dec 26 05:26:44 2001
***************
*** 1 ****
! MD5 (pcsc-lite-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 519f86b5cdddd7bfb9ab6330dd8966b3
--- 1 ----
! MD5 (pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2.tar.gz) = 09d469948775baa4fdb8c2636db99eee
diff -crN pcsc-lite/files/patch-.::Makefile.in /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-.::Makefile.in
*** pcsc-lite/files/patch-.::Makefile.in	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-.::Makefile.in	Wed Dec 26 05:54:20 2001
***************
*** 0 ****
--- 1,7 ----
+ --- Makefile.in.dist	Wed Dec 26 05:46:49 2001
+ +++ Makefile.in	Wed Dec 26 05:46:55 2001
+ @@ -74,3 +74,3 @@
+  AUTOMAKE_OPTIONS = no-dependencies
+ -SUBDIRS = src etc doc
+ +SUBDIRS = src
+  
diff -crN pcsc-lite/files/patch-etc::Makefile.in /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-etc::Makefile.in
*** pcsc-lite/files/patch-etc::Makefile.in	Tue Dec 25 03:54:40 2001
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-etc::Makefile.in	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
***************
*** 1,12 ****
- $FreeBSD: ports/devel/pcsc-lite/files/patch-etc::Makefile.in,v 1.1 2001/12/25 02:54:40 petef Exp $
- 
- --- etc/Makefile.in.dist	Thu Nov  8 02:58:55 2001
- +++ etc/Makefile.in	Thu Nov  8 02:59:36 2001
- @@ -74,5 +74,5 @@
-  
- -sysconf_DATA = reader.conf
- +sysconf_DATA =
-  
- -EXTRA_DIST = reader.conf StartupParameters.plist SmartcardServices
- +EXTRA_DIST = StartupParameters.plist SmartcardServices
-  mkinstalldirs = $(SHELL) $(top_srcdir)/build/mkinstalldirs
--- 0 ----
diff -crN pcsc-lite/files/patch-src::dyn_bsd.c /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-src::dyn_bsd.c
*** pcsc-lite/files/patch-src::dyn_bsd.c	Tue Dec 25 03:54:40 2001
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/files/patch-src::dyn_bsd.c	Wed Dec 26 06:40:01 2001
***************
*** 1,6 ****
! --- src/dyn_bsd.c.dist	Thu Nov  8 16:40:00 2001
! +++ src/dyn_bsd.c	Thu Nov  8 16:40:21 2001
! @@ -74,3 +74,3 @@
     *pvFHandle = 0;
  -  *pvFHandle = dlsym( pvLHandle, pcFunctionName );
  +  *pvFHandle = dlsym( pvLHandle, pcFunction );
--- 1,6 ----
! --- src/dyn_bsd.c.dist	Wed Dec 26 06:37:11 2001
! +++ src/dyn_bsd.c	Wed Dec 26 06:39:24 2001
! @@ -77,3 +77,3 @@
     *pvFHandle = 0;
  -  *pvFHandle = dlsym( pvLHandle, pcFunctionName );
  +  *pvFHandle = dlsym( pvLHandle, pcFunction );
diff -crN pcsc-lite/pkg-plist /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/pkg-plist
*** pcsc-lite/pkg-plist	Tue Dec 25 03:54:39 2001
--- /home/soth/MUSCLE/FreeBSD-pcsc-lite-1.0.2.beta2/pkg-plist	Wed Dec 26 06:42:41 2001
***************
*** 1,9 ****
  etc/rc.d/pcscd.sh.sample
  etc/reader.conf.sample
  include/atrhandler.h
  include/configfile.h
  include/debuglog.h
- include/dyn_generic.h
  include/eventhandler.h
  include/hotplug.h
  include/ifdhandler.h
--- 1,13 ----
+ bin/installifd
+ bin/formaticc
+ share/doc/pcsc-lite/pcsc-lite-0.8.7.pdf
+ share/doc/pcsc-lite/README.DAEMON
  etc/rc.d/pcscd.sh.sample
  etc/reader.conf.sample
+ include/dyn_generic.h
  include/atrhandler.h
  include/configfile.h
  include/debuglog.h
  include/eventhandler.h
  include/hotplug.h
  include/ifdhandler.h
***************
*** 17,26 ****
  include/winscard_msg.h
  include/winscard_svc.h
  include/wintypes.h
- lib/libpcsclite-core.a
- lib/libpcsclite-core.so
- lib/libpcsclite-core.so.0
- lib/libpcsclite.a
- lib/libpcsclite.so
  lib/libpcsclite.so.0
  sbin/pcscd
--- 21,29 ----
  include/winscard_msg.h
  include/winscard_svc.h
  include/wintypes.h
  lib/libpcsclite.so.0
+ lib/libpcsclite.so
+ lib/libpcsclite.la
+ lib/libpcsclite.a
  sbin/pcscd
+ @dirrm share/doc/pcsc-lite



-- 
Toni Andjelkovic
<toni@soth.at>
